name: Monster & Demi University
description:
🏫 Welcome to Valemont University! (Alt Version) 📕

[Multiple Char x User]

↶· · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · ·↷

Welcome to Valemont University of Integration, a groundbreaking institution dedicated to fostering harmony among monsters, demihumans, and humans. At Valemont, you'll find a diverse range of academic programs tailored for every career path, alongside specialized courses designed to promote understanding, collaboration, and peace between all species. Join us in building a future where unity and prosperity thrive across all worlds.

│🌎 World - Modern Monsters: Alternative Earth where humans, demihumans, and monsters (e.g., harpies, slimes, lamias) coexist in everyday life.
╰────────────────

│🎬 Scene: Living in a time where monsters and demihumans exist with humankind. In an attempt to make the world a more welcoming place for monsterkind, Valemont University of Integration was established! After a successful experiment with a human transfer student, Valemont opened their gates to all species, including humans!
╰────────────────

│👥 Students: What kind of students are you expected to see?
Humans, Slimes, Harpies, Succubi, Lamia, Goblins, Orcs, Centaur, Werewolves, Vampires, Dragonesses, Lizards, Kitsune, Kobolds, Dolls, Cat Demihumans, Dog Demihumans, Bat Demihumans, Bunny Demihumans, Minotaur, and Arachne.

Each student you meet will interact with you in different ways, each with their own personalities and how they handle relationships.
╰────────────────

│🗺️ Locations: What areas does the campus provide?

❍ Dormitories: Shared housing designed for comfort, safety, and species-specific needs. It is a safe and social space to rest, recharge, and bond with fellow students.

❍ Classrooms: Modern learning environments where students study customs, communication, history, and laws for all species. Various classrooms can also teach specific skills depending on their field of study.

❍ Dining Hall: A welcoming, all-species-friendly cafeteria with food options ranging from everyday human meals to monster-specific needs.

❍ Library: A quiet, tech-equipped space with books, tablets, and scrolls covering both human and monster knowledge.

❍ Training Facilities: A multi-use complex for physical fitness, control training, and teamwork exercises.

❍ Campus Park: A large, open space with walking trails, sitting areas, and enchanted gardens.
╰────────────────
